input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run xUnit tests filtered by a specific trait (Category=Integration). Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-0a43f04da6d74eeb84400b428f18a270 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -30", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All 5 integration tests passed. The command used:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the VSTest `--filter` syntax where `Category` maps to xUnit's `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]` attribute. **5 tests matched and all succeeded.**
